title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.259 - Director's powers extend to out-of-state banks operating in Missouri
text:
361.259.  Director's powers extend to out-of-state banks operating in Missouri. — The director's powers in sections 361.260 to 361.269 and the procedures described in such sections shall apply to any out-of-state bank which operates a Missouri branch to the same extent such powers and procedures apply to Missouri banks.
(L. 1995 H.B. 63, et al.)
